title: Chapter 3
text: “Black Honey” by Thrice   “Castle” by Halsey   “Control” by Puddle of Mudd   “Cry Little Sister” by Seasons After   “Emotionless” by Red Sun Rising   “Go to Hell” by KMFDM   “Heavy In Your Arms” by Florence + The Machine   “Jekyll and Hyde” by Five Finger Death Punch   “Like a Nightmare” by Never Say Die   “Lung (Bronchitis Mix)” by Sister Machine Gun   “Paint It, Black” by Ciara   “Remember We Die” by Gemini Syndrome   “Save Yourself” by Stabbing Westward   “Scumgrief (Deep Dub Trauma Mix)” by Fear Factory   “Smells Like Teen Spirit” by Think Up Anger   “Smokin’ In the Boys Room” by Mötley Crüe   “Waiting Game” by Banks
